distance_km.note: No web sources found describing a 32km cross-country ski race named 'Highland Cross'. The official site describes a 50-mile (80km) duathlon (20 miles foot, 30 miles bike), not skiing[1].

elevation_m.note: No reliable web sources found for a 'Highland Cross' cross-country ski race with 500m elevation gain.

country.note: While Scottish Highlands are in UK, no sources confirm a matching ski race.

region_state_province.note: No sources confirm ski race in Scottish Highlands named 'Highland Cross'.

discipline.note: No sources confirm classic discipline for this ski race.

field_size.note: No sources confirm ~200 participants for ski race; duathlon has ~750-800[1].

founded.note: No sources confirm 1983 founding for ski race; duathlon history mentioned but no year[1].

official_website.note: Official site exists but describes duathlon, not cross-country ski race[1].

race_date.note: No sources confirm March date for ski race; duathlon in June/July[1].
